11.reason: [Error: When i equals p, num[i-1] accesses num[p-1], which is out of bounds. The loop should stop at i > p to avoid accessing index p-1. Also, the original element at position p is overwritten before being saved.]

19.reason: [The loop condition 'i<=p' causes the loop to run only once, but it should shift elements from p to q-1 to restore the original array. It should be 'i < q' to properly reverse the effect of swap.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: The loop condition i<=p means it runs only once (i=p), so it only copies num[p] to num[p] (no shift). It should be i<q to shift elements left from p to q-1.]

21.reason: [Error: When i=p, num[i+1] is num[p+1], but the loop only runs once, so it doesn't properly restore the array. Additionally, the loop should shift all elements from p to q-1 left by one.]
